description: Accounts in Arabic script, with some interesting details, e.g., mentioning a ḥaver and possibly food items such as mulūkhiyya and zirbāj (a type of stew) (seven lines from the bottom). Above that: two vials of rosewater (qārūratayn māward). Quantities of money are mostly in dirhams.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
